things.name: Ganga Aarti Ceremony (Dashashwamedh Ghat)
things.description: Nightly fire ceremony on the banks of the Ganges - the most spiritually powerful ritual in Hinduism

things.name: Dawn Boat Ride on the Ganges
things.description: Rowing past the 87 ghats at sunrise as priests pray and bodies are cremated

things.name: Manikarnika Ghat (Burning Ghat)
things.description: Varanasi's main cremation ghat burning 24 hours a day - Hindus believe dying here grants moksha

things.name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
things.description: Hinduism's most sacred temple dedicated to Lord Shiva with gold-plated spires

things.name: Old City & Labyrinthine Lanes
things.description: Getting lost in the ancient cow-filled alleyways between the ghats and the temples

things.name: Sarnath
things.description: 10km away - the deer park where the Buddha gave his first sermon after enlightenment

things.name: Durga Temple (Monkey Temple)
things.description: 18th-century temple to Durga with resident rhesus monkeys

things.name: Silk Weaving Workshops
things.description: Varanasi's famous brocade silk sarees woven on handlooms in family workshops

things.name: Bharat Mata Temple
things.description: Unique temple with a marble relief map of undivided India instead of a deity

things.name: Lassi at Blue Lassi Shop
things.description: Legendary yogurt drink shop serving since 1925 with 20 flavours including bhang lassi
